document_summary: Official notice from Donghua University about declaring the selection of National Planning Textbook in the 11th Five-Year Plan of General Higher Education. This document establishes the significance and prestige of national planning textbook designation, which Liu's textbook received, as the only national planning textbooks during the 11th Five-Year Plan period.

snippets.text: National Planning Textbook in the 11th Five- Year Plan of General Higher Education are the only "National Planning Textbooks" during the period of the \(11^{\text{th}}\) Five- year Plan in China. The compilation of these textbooks not only reflects the level of textbook construction and teaching level of each university, but also provides an opportunity for all institutions of higher education in China (including 211 universities) to compete and cooperate on the same platform.
snippets.subject: National Planning Textbook program
snippets.reasoning: Establishes National Planning Textbooks as the ONLY such designation during the Five-Year Plan, reflecting the highest level of textbook recognition in China.

snippets.text: Textbooks are the basic tools for teaching and an important guarantee for improving teaching quality. Textbook construction is an important content of teaching reform and an important reflection of the results of teaching reform. Each college should pay great attention to it.
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education
snippets.reasoning: Official government statement on the importance of national planning textbooks, supporting the significance of Liu's textbook recognition.

snippets.text: The compilation of national- level teaching materials will become an important part of the teaching reform achievements and can be used to participate in the evaluation and assessment of the next national and municipal teaching achievement awards.
snippets.subject: National Planning Textbook program
snippets.reasoning: National-level teaching materials qualify for national teaching achievement awards, establishing the award-level significance of Liu's textbook.

entities.name: Ministry of Education
entities.identity: Chinese government ministry overseeing higher education
